title: Method with Args
description: Define a method that takes a single parameter and returns a calculated result.
problemStatement:
Reusable code! Define a method `double_it` that takes one argument `n`. It should return the value of `n * 2`.

**Requirement:** Do not use the `return` keyword (Ruby automatically returns the last expression).
hints: In Ruby, methods end with the result of the final line by default.
expectedOutput: The method returns the doubled value when called
